《岳麓公共治理》编辑部关于规范生成式人工智能工具使用的声明

artifacts.claimText: For Hunan University's 2026 National Natural Science Foundation application notice, applicants who use generative AI to track research, collect literature, or organize references are instructed to verify AI-generated information and references, take responsibility for generated content, truthfully declare use, label relevant content under cited national rules, and not use directly AI-generated or unverified generated application content.

citation.citationTitle: 国自科——关于做好2026年度国家自然科学基金申请有关工作的通知
citation.publisher: Hunan University Science and Technology Research Institute
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: The Yue Lu Public Governance editorial office states that its journal does not accept manuscripts with generative AI tools as authors, limits generative AI use in submissions to auxiliary research tasks, rejects manuscripts with AI-generated core content or concealed tool use, and requires authors who used generative AI assistance to submit an AIGC tool-use disclosure statement.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 国自科——关于做好2026年度国家自然科学基金申请有关工作的通知
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 申请人在撰写申请书时，如果借助生成式人工智能技术跟踪研究动态、收集整理参考文献，必须由人工核实生成式人工智能生成信息和参考文献的真实性和准确性。申请人应当对使用的生成内容负责，应当全面如实声明使用情况，按照《人工智能生成合成内容标识办法》《负责任研究行为规范指引（2023）》等国家有关规定对相关内容进行标识。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: For 2026 NSFC applications, the notice says applicants using generative AI for research tracking, literature collection, or reference organization must verify AI-generated information and references, take responsibility for generated content, truthfully declare use, and label relevant content.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 《岳麓公共治理》编辑部关于规范生成式人工智能工具使用的声明
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 本刊不接收任何生成式人工智能工具参与署名的稿件，稿件的原创思想、核心观点、研究设计及主体论证必须由研究者本人独立完成。生成式人工智能工具在投稿中的应用，仅限于语言润色、文献检索、数据整理与分析等辅助研究环节，不得涉及稿件核心内容的生成与创作。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The journal says it does not accept manuscripts with generative AI tools as authors, requires core ideas and arguments to be independently completed by researchers, and limits generative AI use to auxiliary research steps.

artifacts.title: Hunan University AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: Official-domain discovery did not verify a central public Hunan University AI-use policy. The run stages two narrow agent-reviewed claims: one about 2026 National Natural Science Foundation application use of generative AI, and one about generative AI use in submissions to the Yue Lu Public Governance journal.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No central public Hunan University AI policy was verified in this run.
The staged claims are scoped to the official sources named in their citations and should not be treated as university-wide coursework policy.
